heading: We actually know your industry
body: We don't build websites for everyone. We know what a homeowner types when their AC dies at midnight. We know which keywords convert in a competitive market and which ones waste budget. That specificity is baked into every page we build.

heading: We optimize for how people search
body: Google rankings matter. So does showing up in Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT answers, and Perplexity results when someone asks 'best HVAC company in Oklahoma.' Most agencies have never heard of AEO or GEO. We build for all of it, because that's where search is going and we're not interested in catching up later.

heading: We don't disappear after launch
body: The freelancer who built your last site? Gone after delivery. We're on retainer every single month — posting, tracking, updating, and reporting. You'll know exactly what we did and what moved because of it. No mystery PDF reports. No vanishing acts.

heading: Invisible to your clients
body: We operate completely behind your brand. No CaedoAi watermarks, no email threads your client can trace. You're the agency — we're just the engine. White-label is the default, not an upgrade.
